cookies.text: We use cookies to ensure proper website functionality and to improve your experience. By continuing to use the site, you agree to the use of cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AirComfort (hereinafter — "the Company") is committed to protecting your personal data and ensuring transparency in its processing in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.s1body: We collect only the data you voluntarily provide through the contact form: name, phone number, and optionally email address and message text. We do not collect sensitive personal data.
privacy.s2body: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry and provide information about air conditioning equipment and installation services. We do not sell or transfer your data to third parties.
privacy.s3body: The website uses technical cookies necessary for its proper operation, as well as analytics cookies (with your consent) to improve the user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through the banner at the bottom of the page.
privacy.s4body: Personal data is stored no longer than necessary for the relevant purpose or as required by applicable law. Data submitted through the contact form is deleted after the request is processed.
privacy.s5body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to the processing of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us by email.
privacy.s6body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us:
